response.justification: Bogdan Szabo’s resume demonstrates strong expertise in software development, particularly in full-stack, AI-agent infrastructure, and embedded systems. However, his background lacks direct experience with hardware optimization, SoC/IP modeling, or AI accelerator architectures, which are core to the Principal Performance Architect role. His work in web, mobile, and cloud services does not align closely with the deep-learning workload optimization or hardware-software co-design requirements.
strengths: Strong full-stack development skills with experience in multiple languages (TypeScript, Node.js, D, C++)
Proven ability to optimize performance in low-latency systems and real-time applications
Demonstrated expertise in system architecture, CI/CD, and DevOps practices
concerns: No direct experience with SoC/IP modeling or AI accelerator hardware
Lacks background in deep neural network training/inference optimization or GPU architecture
Education and work history do not align with the principal-level requirements for hardware/cloud infrastructure optimization
